message:
fix(gen_server,database,time): complete checkpoint migration and fix virtual-time bugs

Three related runtime correctness fixes:

- gen_server: replace remaining cx.is_cancel_requested() calls with the
  canonical cx.checkpoint().is_err() pattern, completing the cancel-check
  migration visible in recent commits

- database/pool: the cancel-poll sleep loop called crate::time::wall_now()
  (ambient wall clock) instead of cx.now() (structured Cx clock), breaking
  deterministic testing under LabRuntime with virtual time

- time/wheel: the Ord implementation for OverflowEntry had self and other
  swapped in the generation tiebreaker, reversing the intended ordering
  where lower generation should win ties

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
